dtx_products.description: What the software does therapeutically and its mechanism of action (e.g. CBT, rhythmic auditory cueing). 1-3 sentences.
clinical_area_icd10: Primary ICD-10 code only, unless the product is clearly multi-indication
dtx_products.category: Therapeutic category / indication area (e.g. "Mental health", "Neurology", "Chronic pain"), or null
dtx_products.risk_class: US FDA medical-device risk class only. Actively check FDA sources (the openFDA / 510(k) / De Novo / PMA databases and the manufacturer's own regulatory statements) by company and product name. If the product has an FDA clearance/authorization, report the class in the exact form "Class I according to FDA", "Class II according to FDA", or "Class III according to FDA", inferring the class from the regulatory pathway when needed (510(k) and De Novo are typically Class II; PMA is typically Class III). Use null when the product is NOT an FDA-cleared device (for example a consumer wellness device, or a device that is only CE-marked in the EU). Never copy a non-US (EU CE / MDR) class into this field, and do not output vague phrases like "FDA listed" or "FDA cleared".
dtx_products.date_of_first_listing: First availability or FDA clearance/authorization date as "YYYY-MM-DD" (or year), else null
dtx_products.app_store_url: Apple App Store URL or null
dtx_products.play_store_url: Google Play Store URL or null
dtx_products.price_usd: Price as a string like "199.00" or null
languages: Languages the product is offered in (e.g. English). Empty list if unknown.
trial_registration_ids: Clinical trial registration IDs (e.g. NCT........, ISRCTN........) if known, else empty list

reviews_appstore.rating: Apple App Store average rating 0-5 as a number, or null
reviews_appstore.review_count: Apple App Store number of ratings/reviews as an integer, or null

reviews_playstore.rating: Google Play Store average rating 0-5 as a number, or null
reviews_playstore.review_count: Google Play Store number of ratings/reviews as an integer, or null

dtx_products.source_url: URL of the page this product information was found on (required)

company_info.company_website: Official company website URL or null
company_info.company_founding_year: Four-digit year as a number, or null

research_notes: Any relevant notes about the research findings, or why no products were found
